author: Ivan Roliuk
description: Transform Obsidian Graph View into an animated themed graph with glowing nodes and garland-style wires. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ivan Roliuk
manifest.description: Transforms Graph View into an animated themed graph with glowing nodes and garland-style wires.
manifest.name: Chillight Graph

name: Chillight Graph

releases.author: irolyuk
releases.description:
# Chillight Graph v1.0.3

### Improvements

- Renamed remaining sample classes and interfaces.
- Improved code consistency.
- Removed deprecated API usage.
- Updated project structure.
- Community review compatibility improvements.

No functional changes for users.
releases.name: Chillight Graph v1.0.3

releases.author: irolyuk
releases.description:
# Chillight Graph v1.0.2

## Fixed

- Renamed remaining sample classes.
- Updated plugin settings classes.
- Removed deprecated `setDynamicTooltip()` calls.
- Replaced `globalThis` with `window` for better compatibility.
- Improved metadata for Community Plugin review.

This release focuses on compatibility with the Obsidian Community Plugin review process.
releases.name: Chillight Graph v1.0.2

releases.author: irolyuk
releases.description:
# 🎉 Chillight Graph 1.0.0

First public release of Chillight Graph.

## ✨ Features

- 14 unique visual themes
- Animated glowing nodes
- Curved garland-style wires
- Multiple animation modes
- Adjustable wire color
- Adjustable wire thickness
- Adjustable wire glow
- Adjustable wire sag
- Adjustable node size
- Adjustable node glow
- Adjustable node text color

Thank you for trying Chillight Graph ❤️
releases.name: Chillight Graph v1.0.0
